title: What Is AI? A Grounded Definition From NIST, RDD, and Compound AI Systems Research
description: A source-cited answer to "what is AI" — NIST's AI RMF definition, Responsibility-Driven Design's confederation concept, and BAIR's Compound AI Systems research, applied to how VS MCP Bridge actually structures Model, Agent, Tool, Retrieval, Memory, and Security as a confederation rather than one component.
author: AI Systems Author
